research_questions: What is the technical description and affected software for {cve_id}?
What CVSS score, CWE classification, and attack vector does {cve_id} have?
Is {cve_id} in the CISA KEV catalog and what is the remediation timeline?
What is the EPSS exploitation probability score for {cve_id}?
Are there known exploits, PoC code, or in-the-wild attacks for {cve_id}?
What are the recommended mitigations and patches for {cve_id}?
rationale: CVE vulnerability analysis requires NVD metadata, KEV status, EPSS score, and open source research for exploitation context
